message:
test: expand benchmark, perf gate, CI suite, and QA policy validation coverage

Benchmark scenario runner (tests/bench_scenario_runner.rs):
- Add SessionMatrixSeedRow struct with matched-state and realistic
  matrix seed data for 100K–5M message session benchmarks
- Add PARTITION_REALISTIC, EVIDENCE_CLASS_INFERRED, CONFIDENCE_MEDIUM
  constants for multi-partition benchmark claims

Benchmark schema validation (tests/bench_schema.rs):
- Add comprehensive regression_guards validation: require
  failure_or_gap_reasons array, enforce pass/fail/missing status for
  memory/correctness/security guards with bidirectional reason alignment
  (e.g., "fail" status requires corresponding _regression reason, "pass"
  must not have it)
- Validate evidence_links: require phase1_unit_and_fault_injection,
  required_artifacts (scenario_runner, stratification,
  baseline_variance_confidence), and source_identity with run_id +
  correlation_id cross-checked against top-level values
- Validate consumption_contract.artifact_ready_for_phase5 boolean is
  consistent with all guards passing and zero missing cells

Perf baseline variance (tests/perf_baseline_variance.rs):
- Add cross_env_breakdown_component_decomposition_conserves_spread:
  verifies environment + noise = total spread with <1e-9 tolerance
- Add cross_env_breakdown_zero_noise_floor_yields_finite_signal_ratio:
  ensures signal-to-noise remains finite when all CVs are zero
- Add cross_env_breakdown_rejects_invalid_input_shapes: single-env,
  length mismatch, and empty inputs all fail closed
- Add evidence_adjudication_matrix_schema_registered_in_instance and
  has_core_relationships tests

Perf budgets (tests/perf_budgets.rs):
- Replace magic number 22.0 with BINARY_SIZE_RELEASE_BUDGET_MB constant

Perf regression (tests/perf_regression.rs):
- Extract build_pi_binary_candidates() and build_binary_size_candidates()
  as testable pure functions, separating binary-size checks from general
  binary discovery
- binary_size_check() now uses binary_size_candidates() (excludes debug
  and CARGO_BIN_EXE overrides) for more accurate size measurement
- Add unit tests: default order, profile insertion, env override + dedup

CI full suite gate (tests/ci_full_suite_gate.rs):
- Add normalize_repo_relative_evidence_path(): normalizes backslash
  separators, strips ./, rejects .., UNC, and absolute paths
- Add cross-category evidence uniqueness validation (same path cannot
  appear in both unit_evidence and e2e_evidence)
- Add is_canonical_perf3x_bead_id() for stricter bead ID validation
  (must be bd-3ar8v. followed by dot-separated numeric segments)
- Promote PERF-3X bead coverage audit from warning to blocking gate
- Missing evidence paths now produce "fail" instead of "warn"

QA docs policy validation (tests/qa_docs_policy_validation.rs):
- Add unresolved_conflicting_claims to fail-closed conditions check
- Add regression guard validation tokens to run_all wiring assertions
- Add run_all_emits_evidence_adjudication_matrix_artifacts test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+#[test]
+fn run_all_emits_evidence_adjudication_matrix_artifacts() {
+    let run_all = load_text("scripts/e2e/run_all.sh");
+
+    for token in [
+        "pi.claim_integrity.evidence_adjudication_matrix.v1",
+        "claim_integrity_evidence_adjudication_matrix.json",
+        "claim_integrity_evidence_adjudication_matrix.md",
+        "claim_integrity.evidence_adjudication_matrix_json",
+        "claim_integrity.evidence_adjudication_matrix_markdown",
+        "\"claim_integrity_adjudication_matrix\"",
+        "\"unresolved_conflict_count\"",
+        "\"canonical_sources\"",
+        "\"stale_or_noncanonical_sources\"",
+    ] {
+        assert!(
+            run_all.contains(token),
+            "scripts/e2e/run_all.sh must include adjudication-matrix token: {token}"
+        );
+    }
+}
+
